title: Like Glue Fridays — Reggae, Soca, Afrobeat & Dancehall
description: Atlanta's weekly Friday night staple for Caribbean and African groove lovers. Great crowd energy, dancing, and vibes. Perfect for couples who want a fun night out with good music and a lively atmosphere.

title: ECHOES — KAI LIN ART Exhibition (Final Days)
description: Last day of this acclaimed group exhibition exploring themes of connection and identity. Free and open to the public — a thoughtful, sophisticated date idea for couples who appreciate art and conversation.

title: Dustin Nickerson — Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 2021 Powers Ferry Rd, Alpharetta, GA
description: Dustin Nickerson brings his relatable, hilariously human comedy to Atlanta for a weekend run. Great date — drinks, food, and guaranteed laughs at one of the city's best comedy clubs.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
location: Laughing Skull Lounge, 855 8th St NW, Atlanta
description: Weekly showcase of Atlanta's best up-and-coming comedians. Laughing Skull is 21+ with a fun, unpretentious vibe — perfect for couples who don't take themselves too seriously.

title: Jim Breuer: Find The Funny
location: Buckhead Theatre, 3110 Roswell Rd NE, Atlanta
description: The legendary comedian and SNL alum brings his Find The Funny tour to Atlanta. A bigger venue, great for couples who want a full night out with serious standup energy.

title: Salsa ATL's Tropical Elegance — Saturday Latin Night
description: Atlanta's premier Saturday night latin dance event. Dress up, dance close, and enjoy a full night of salsa, bachata, and merengue. Great for both beginners and experienced dancers.

title: HANGEO Thursdays — Salsa & Bachata Night
location: 290 Hilderbrand Dr, Suite A5, Atlanta, GA 30328
description: Atlanta's go-to Thursday latin dance night (1st & 3rd Thursdays). Full lesson + social dancing. Friendly crowd, great music, and a low-pressure way to learn to dance together as a couple.

title: One Night of Queen — Atlanta Symphony Hall
location: Atlanta Symphony Hall, 1280 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: The legendary tribute band recreates Queen's iconic concert experience with stunning accuracy. A premium date night at one of Atlanta's most elegant venues — perfect for music lovers.

title: Atlanta Jazz Festival 2026 — PJ Morton, Esperanza Spalding & More
description: Atlanta's signature jazz celebration runs May 23-25 with PJ Morton, Esperanza Spalding, DESTIN CONRAD and more. Free outdoor concerts in Piedmont Park — an incredible, romantic date experience under the open sky.

title: R.A.S Memorial Weekend — 100% Reggae Afrobeat Soca
location: Underground Atlanta, 50 Lower Alabama St SW, Atlanta
description: Memorial Weekend kicks off with pure reggae, Afrobeat, and soca energy. Underground Atlanta is a one-of-a-kind venue with history and character. Dance close, enjoy Caribbean vibes all night long.

title: Birthday Bash ATL — T.I., Gucci Mane, 2 Chainz & More
location: State Farm Arena, 191 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: The ultimate Atlanta hip-hop throwback concert. T.I., Gucci Mane, 2 Chainz, Waka Flocka, Soulja Boy, and more on one stage. One of the hottest date nights of the year — get tickets early.

title: Atlanta Jazz Festival — Day 2
description: Second day of Atlanta's premier jazz festival. Free outdoor concerts, food vendors, and an incredible atmosphere. Spend the whole day together exploring music across multiple stages in Piedmont Park.

title: HOME v.2: Homeland — Decatur Arts Alliance
location: Fourth Floor Gallery, Decatur Library, 215 Sycamore St, Decatur
description: A powerful group exhibition exploring homeland, identity, and belonging through visual art. Runs through July 18 — a great ongoing cultural date option for thoughtful couples.

title: Honey Pierre's 'Notions' — One Contemporary Gallery
description: Atlanta fiber artist Honey Pierre's punch needle work on display through June 13. A unique, intimate gallery experience for couples interested in contemporary art and craft.

title: Like Glue Fridays — Reggae, Soca, Afrobeat & Dancehall
description: The weekly Friday night Caribbean/African dance party continues. Consistently one of the best events in the city for couples who love to dance and enjoy good energy music.
